<<code language="ocaml" | PAGE ->
  sig
    val make_page :
      Page.content -> [> Html_types.html ] Eliom.Content.Html.elt
    val page :
      ?predicate:('a -> 'b -> bool Lwt.t) ->
      ?fallback:('a -> 'b -> exn -> Page.content Lwt.t) ->
      ('a -> 'b -> Page.content Lwt.t) ->
      'a -> 'b -> Html_types.html Eliom.Content.Html.elt Lwt.t
    module Opt :
      sig
        val connected_page :
          ?allow:Types.Group.t list ->
          ?deny:Types.Group.t list ->
          ?predicate:(Types.User.id option -> 'a -> 'b -> bool Lwt.t) ->
          ?fallback:(Types.User.id option ->
                     'a -> 'b -> exn -> Page.content Lwt.t) ->
          (Types.User.id option -> 'a -> 'b -> Page.content Lwt.t) ->
          'a -> 'b -> Html_types.html Eliom.Content.Html.elt Lwt.t
      end
    val connected_page :
      ?allow:Types.Group.t list ->
      ?deny:Types.Group.t list ->
      ?predicate:(Types.User.id option -> 'a -> 'b -> bool Lwt.t) ->
      ?fallback:(Types.User.id option ->
                 'a -> 'b -> exn -> Page.content Lwt.t) ->
      (Types.User.id -> 'a -> 'b -> Page.content Lwt.t) ->
      'a -> 'b -> Html_types.html Eliom.Content.Html.elt Lwt.t
  end >>
